cards.hook: No game over sixty quid is more than a 7/10
cards.caption: No game over sixty quid is more than a 7/10. A blunt rule for scoring games by price, not hype. The kind of sharp take my feed keeps and the timeline buries.
cards.stance: Price should cap the score: charge AAA money, you don't get to hide behind indie grading.

cards.hook: Indie devs can't do $100 deluxe editions. Build a great game instead.
cards.caption: Indie devs can't fund $100 deluxe editions, so stop expecting them to. Make a kick-ass product and players come. The dev-scene talk my feed surfaces before the timeline.
cards.stance: Deluxe editions are a big-publisher tax; a great small game needs none of it.

cards.hook: 14 people, most part-time, run this game studio
triggers: weak: reply fragment, no standalone context

cards.hook: Steam and GoG made gamers stop caring about physical copies
cards.caption: Steam and GoG got so trustworthy that all-digital libraries stopped scaring anyone. Most PC devs skip physical releases now. The shift my feed catches before the timeline argues about it.
cards.stance: Physical PC releases are nostalgia, not preservation; trust killed the disc.

cards.hook: A fresh batch of indie games dropped on Steam and Switch today
cards.caption: A fresh batch of smaller indie titles just launched on Steam and Switch. The releases worth playing hide under the AAA noise. This is the stuff my feed keeps for you.

cards.hook: Dev shows off new scoreboard animations, live on itch
triggers: weak: build-log fragment, no hook payoff

cards.hook: An atmospheric driving game through Dutch dikes and windmills
cards.caption: Lowlands Racer: an atmospheric driving game through Dutch polders, dikes and windmills, built in public. The oddly specific indie gems my feed finds before the timeline.

cards.hook: 99k views, 10 years of free games, funded only by donations
cards.caption: 99k views. 10+ years of gamedev. Every game free, funded purely by voluntary donations. Proof you can build without a paywall. The wins my feed keeps that the timeline never shows you.
cards.stance: Free-plus-donations is a real business model, not charity.
